title: PUP Smart Track
bullets: Collaborated with a cross-functional team to design and develop responsive, intuitive user interfaces.
Engineered a library of reusable frontend components to accelerate development cycles and maintain code consistency.
Optimized the frontend architecture to ensure a seamless and efficient user experience for inventory.
description: Collaborated with a cross-functional team to design and develop responsive, intuitive user interfaces. Engineered a library of reusable frontend components to accelerate development cycles and maintain code consistency. Optimized the frontend architecture to ensure a seamless and efficient user experience for inventory.

title: Faith Hope Love Website Enhancement
bullets: Led the frontend modernization of existing web pages, resulting in faster performance and a smoother user experience.
Collaborated directly with the development team to troubleshoot issues, validate system fixes, and deploy user-facing enhancements.
Identified, documented, and tracked software bugs to continuously improve overall system quality.
description: Led the frontend modernization of existing web pages, resulting in faster performance and a smoother user experience. Collaborated directly with the development team to troubleshoot issues, validate system fixes, and deploy user-facing enhancements. Identified, documented, and tracked software bugs to continuously improve overall system quality.

title: Bleu Bean Online Ordering System
bullets: Engineered the frontend architecture using React.js to create a seamless, responsive user experience for an online ordering platform.
Developing a transaction reporting platform featuring a real-time data visualization dashboard.
Designing a user-friendly interface to simplify the monitoring of complex datasets.
description: Engineered the frontend architecture using React.js to create a seamless, responsive user experience for an online ordering platform. Developing a transaction reporting platform featuring a real-time data visualization dashboard. Designing a user-friendly interface to simplify the monitoring of complex datasets.

title: GeoSensei: AI-Driven Geography Learning Platform
bullets: Co-authored the research paper detailing the platform's development, which was accepted and presented at the 3rd Nemesio Prudente International Research Conference.
Built a web-based, gamified geography learning platform integrating AI-driven feedback and crowdsourced geospatial data.
Implemented crowdsourced geospatial data and Mapillary street-level imagery to create interactive, real-world mapping challenges.
description: Co-authored the research paper detailing the platform's development, which was accepted and presented at the 3rd Nemesio Prudente International Research Conference. Built a web-based, gamified geography learning platform integrating AI-driven feedback and crowdsourced geospatial data. Implemented crowdsourced geospatial data and Mapillary street-level imagery to create interactive, real-world mapping challenges.

title: Second Chances - Pet Adoption System
bullets: Developed a web-based pet adoption platform to streamline adopter-pet matching and application management.
Implemented user authentication, pet listing management, and adoption request workflows.
Designed an intuitive interface to improve accessibility for shelters and prospective adopters.
description: Developed a web-based pet adoption platform to streamline adopter-pet matching and application management. Implemented user authentication, pet listing management, and adoption request workflows. Designed an intuitive interface to improve accessibility for shelters and prospective adopters.
